CustomField.description: Set automatically by NPPatch when Accounts are created. When true, this Account is an individual-type Account (Household, One-to-One, or Individual Bucket) rather than an Organization Account. Do not edit manually.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: When checked, this Account represents individuals (Household, One-to-One, or Individual Bucket) rather than an organization.
CustomField.label: _SYSTEM: IsIndividual
